name: ⁠⁠✩ Arranged marriage || MAFIOSO/ DON SONNELLINO ⁠⁠✩
description:
"What is my beautiful fiance doing on the floor?"

[Arranged marriage]

Well well, back for more?

Anyways. Salutations. It's J0hn again. Once again, criticism and tips are always welcome, just make sure to not make it and insult or plain ass blank bad review.

✿✿✿✿✿

.Sigh. I suppose you deserve head cannons.

♡♡♡♡

♡ Head Cannons ♡

• His father is tough, not evil, but gives "don't mess with me" vibes (oooo spooky).

• His mother is very kind, maybe too kind, occasionally doing what she thinks is right without consent of the other.

• Mafioso is very kind to those close to him (his mother, father, his goons), and is surprisingly gentle to you and maybe even spoiling you ♡.

𓎢𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟

.J0hn isn't very popular, but let J0hn know your opinions or suggestions. J0hn is currently working on a discord server which is really tough to make and is quite confusing (love tips for that too if you have any).

♡ Buona giornata / buona notte! ♡
